verses.text: They send to ask whether they should still weep and fast in the fifth month as they had done. A question of ritual. Men wonder about the form while missing the heart.
They send to ask whether they should still weep and fast in the fifth month as they had done. A question of ritual. Men wonder about the form while missing the heart.
They send to ask whether they should still weep and fast in the fifth month as they had done. A question of ritual. Men wonder about the form while missing the heart.
When ye fasted, 'did ye at all fast unto me?' or did ye eat for yourselves? These are the former prophets' words. Empty observance. Fasting that is not unto God profits nothing.
When ye fasted, 'did ye at all fast unto me?' or did ye eat for yourselves? These are the former prophets' words. Empty observance. Fasting that is not unto God profits nothing.
When ye fasted, 'did ye at all fast unto me?' or did ye eat for yourselves? These are the former prophets' words. Empty observance. Fasting that is not unto God profits nothing.
When ye fasted, 'did ye at all fast unto me?' or did ye eat for yourselves? These are the former prophets' words. Empty observance. Fasting that is not unto God profits nothing.
Execute true judgment, show mercy, oppress not the widow, the fatherless, the stranger, or the poor. The real demand. God seeks justice and kindness, not mere ceremony.
Execute true judgment, show mercy, oppress not the widow, the fatherless, the stranger, or the poor. The real demand. God seeks justice and kindness, not mere ceremony.
Execute true judgment, show mercy, oppress not the widow, the fatherless, the stranger, or the poor. The real demand. God seeks justice and kindness, not mere ceremony.
But they refused, made their hearts 'as an adamant stone,' lest they hear the law. Hardened. A heart set against God's word turns to stone.
But they refused, made their hearts 'as an adamant stone,' lest they hear the law. Hardened. A heart set against God's word turns to stone.
As He called and they would not hear, so they cried and He would not hear; He scattered them, and the land was desolate. Just silence. Refused warnings end in unanswered prayers.
